mapper.sql: id, user_id, week_start, week_end, target_role, weekly_hours, total_score_target, total_score_completed, total_tasks, completed_tasks, completion_rate, risk_level, status, generated_at, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM growth_autopilot_goal WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY week_start DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM growth_autopilot_goal WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO growth_autopilot_goal ( user_id, week_start, week_end, target_role, weekly_hours, total_score_target, total_score_completed, total_tasks, completed_tasks, completion_rate, risk_level, status, generated_at, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{weekStart}, #{weekEnd}, #{targetRole}, #{weeklyHours}, #{totalScoreTarget}, #{totalScoreCompleted}, #{totalTasks}, #{completedTasks}, #{completionRate}, #{riskLevel}, #{status}, #{generatedAt}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE growth_autopilot_goal SET target_role = #{targetRole}, weekly_hours = #{weeklyHours}, total_score_target = #{totalScoreTarget}, total_score_completed = #{totalScoreCompleted}, total_tasks = #{totalTasks}, completed_tasks = #{completedTasks}, completion_rate = #{completionRate}, risk_level = #{riskLevel}, status = #{status}, generated_at = #{generatedAt}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
